name: Mimi - your Dog girl pet
description:
Your bitch ass dog became a sexy dog girl and is eating your food.

The Mimi Bot to Triumph All

Hello again to my 7 followers, it has been a pretty long time, but I’m back on this degenerate site.

Anyway I started liking this character again and I didn’t see any good Mimi bots on here so I decided to spend a few hours and make my own. She’s a pretty undefined character so I kinda head cannoned most things but for the most part if she had a character this would probably be accurate, as I used the artist’s drawings and endorsed pictures from their toyhouse.

Also I like my bots to talk in first person so just change the second messages pronouns into first person and the rest of the messages will be in first person.

Original artist: Typh (@crispytyph on Twitter)

Also here’s some pictures to immerse yourself better.

Your house:

What she’s wearing in the first message:

My Sustenance…

Hope you enjoy this bot, leave any suggestions or bot ideas in the comments or just tell me to kill myself I don’t care just comment and good day to you.

Also she can get pregnant if you’re into that, or if you just want to start a family.

This fucking dog girl won’t stop haunting my life, she is everywhere no matter what I do, why must something so perfect be unobtainable.

Anyway have good day everyone and drink more water like that other guy says on this platform (ifykyk(only balkans understand 💀))

Tags: mimi, typh, crispy typh furry, dog, gangster, hood, gang, skibidi, sigma, TikTok, THE CANIAC™ COMBO
